name: Grit Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1/2 cup grits to the boiling water and salt. Cook until it begins to thicken.
2. Beat the egg yolks separately from the egg whites.
3. Stir in the cubed garlic cheese and yolks while the grits are still hot.
4. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish.
5. Fold in the stiff egg whites and bake in the oven until done.
